phrases.intent_en: Ask how to order at the counter
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo se pide en la barra?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, KOH-moh seh PEE-deh en lah BAH-rrah?

likely_response.local: Diga su pedido al camarero y espere aquí.
likely_response.pronunciation: DEE-gah SOO peh-DEE-doh AHL kah-mah-REH-roh Y eh-SPEH-reh ah-k-Í
likely_response.translation_en: Tell your order to the waiter and wait here.

responses.english: Tell your order to the waiter and wait here.
responses.phonetic: DEE-gah SOO peh-DEE-doh AHL kah-mah-REH-roh Y eh-SPEH-reh ah-k-Í
responses.french: Diga su pedido al camarero y espere aquí.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay the bill
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se paga la cuenta?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh seh PAH-gah lah KWEN-tah?

likely_response.local: En la barra, al lado de la puerta
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH BAHR-rah AHL LAH-doh DEH LAH poo-EHR-tah
likely_response.translation_en: At the cash register, next to the exit.

responses.english: At the cash register, next to the exit.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH BAHR-rah AHL LAH-doh DEH LAH poo-EHR-tah
responses.french: En la barra, al lado de la puerta

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the outdoor seating area is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la terraza exterior?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, ¿DOHN-deh es-TAH lah teh-RAH-sah ehks-teh-REE-or?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del local, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL loh-KAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the venue, on the right.

responses.english: At the back of the venue, on the right.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL loh-KAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Al fondo del local, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the breakfast menu
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo ver el menú de desayuno?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh PWEH-doh vehr el meh-NOO deh deh-sah-YOO-noh?

likely_response.local: Sobre la barra, frente a usted.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOHB-reh LAH BAHR-rah FREHN-teh AH oo-STEHD
likely_response.translation_en: On the counter, in front of you.

responses.english: On the counter, in front of you.
responses.phonetic: SOHB-reh LAH BAHR-rah FREHN-teh AH oo-STEHD
responses.french: Sobre la barra, frente a usted.
